ksa_text: Design analytical systems, data models, and architectures, including database design, analytical schema construction, prototype development, and data integration design to support analytical capabilities.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("schemas?", "data model", "database design"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3895); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
